title: A2 Elementary
subtitle: A2 general English practice for middle school students

questions.question: Did you _____ TV last night?
questions.explanation: After the auxiliary verb 'did', we use the base form of the main verb.
questions.explanationZh: 在助动词 did 后面的疑问句中，实义动词要用原形。
questions.coreTakeaway: Always use the base verb after 'did'. (did 后面总是加动词原形。)

questions.question: My older brother is much _____ than me.
questions.explanation: We use the comparative form 'taller' when comparing two people, indicated by the word 'than'.
questions.explanationZh: 句中有 than，表示两者比较，因此形容词要用比较级 taller。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use adjective + 'er' (or 'more' + adjective) + 'than' for comparing two things. (两者比较用比较级 + than。)

questions.question: A doctor who treats sick animals is a _____.
questions.explanation: A vet (veterinarian) is an animal doctor.
questions.explanationZh: 给生病的动物治病的医生叫兽医（vet）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Vet = animal doctor. (vet 指兽医。)

questions.question: How _____ water do you usually drink every day?
questions.explanation: 'Water' is an uncountable noun, so we use 'much'.
questions.explanationZh: water 是不可数名词，提问多少时要用 How much。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'how much' for uncountable nouns and 'how many' for countable nouns. (不可数名词用 much，可数名词用 many。)

questions.question: I was _____ a book when the phone rang.
questions.explanation: The past continuous tense uses 'was/were + verb-ing' to describe an action in progress in the past.
questions.explanationZh: 过去进行时由 was/were + 动词的ing形式构成，表示过去某个时刻正在进行的动作。
questions.coreTakeaway: Past continuous format is was/were + V-ing. (过去进行时结构是 was/were + 动词ing。)

questions.question: I usually _____ the bus to school in the morning.
questions.explanation: The correct verb to use with public transport like a bus or train is 'catch' or 'take'.
questions.explanationZh: 乘坐公交车等公共交通工具，英语通常用动词 take 或 catch。
questions.coreTakeaway: Collocation: take the bus / catch the bus. (固定搭配：乘公交车 take/catch the bus。)

questions.question: The cheetah is the _____ land animal in the world.
questions.explanation: When comparing one thing to all others in a group, use the superlative form 'fastest'.
questions.explanationZh: 在世界上所有的陆地动物中比较，应用最高级 fastest（最快的）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'the' + adjective + 'est' for superlatives. (最高级前要加 the，单音节词尾加 est。)

questions.question: You look very tired. You _____ go to bed early tonight.
questions.explanation: 'Should' is used to give advice or a recommendation.
questions.explanationZh: should 用于提出建议或劝告，意思是“应该”。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'should' to give advice. (用 should 表示建议或劝告。)

questions.question: I can't see the sun today. It is very _____.
questions.explanation: When the sky is full of clouds, the weather is cloudy.
questions.explanationZh: 天空中布满云，看不见太阳，说明天气是 cloudy（多云的）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Cloudy means covered with clouds. (cloudy 意为多云的、阴天的。)

questions.question: If it rains tomorrow, we _____ stay at home.
questions.explanation: In the first conditional, the 'if' clause is present simple, and the main clause uses 'will + base verb'.
questions.explanationZh: 真实条件句（主将从现），if 引导的从句用一般现在时，主句用一般将来时 will + 动词原形。
questions.coreTakeaway: First conditional: If + present, will + base verb. (主将从现原则。)

questions.question: My birthday is _____ October.
questions.explanation: We use 'in' for months, years, and seasons.
questions.explanationZh: 在表示月份、年份和季节的前面，介词用 in。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'in' with months (in October). (月份前用介词 in。)

questions.question: I use my _____ to send text messages and make calls.
questions.explanation: A smartphone or mobile phone is used for these functions.
questions.explanationZh: 发送短信和打电话用的是 smartphone（智能手机）。
questions.coreTakeaway: A smartphone is a mobile phone with internet and apps. (smartphone 意为智能手机。)

questions.question: She enjoys _____ football with her friends on weekends.
questions.explanation: The verb 'enjoy' is always followed by the gerund (verb-ing) form.
questions.explanationZh: 动词 enjoy 后面必须接动名词（动词的ing形式），enjoy doing sth 表示“喜欢做某事”。
questions.coreTakeaway: Enjoy is always followed by V-ing. (enjoy doing sth 固定搭配。)

questions.question: His favorite hobby is _____ pictures of nature.
questions.explanation: The correct collocation is 'taking pictures' or 'taking photos'.
questions.explanationZh: “拍照”的固定搭配是 take pictures 或 take photos。
questions.coreTakeaway: Collocation: take pictures / photos. (固定搭配：take pictures 拍照。)

questions.question: We _____ going to visit our grandparents next week.
questions.explanation: The structure for planned future events is 'be verb (am/is/are) + going to'. Here, 'We' takes 'are'.
questions.explanationZh: 表示将来的计划用 be going to 结构，主语是 We，所以 be 动词用 are。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'are going to' for plural subjects talking about future plans. (We 后接 are going to 表计划。)

questions.question: We need some _____ to make a salad.
questions.explanation: Tomatoes is a common plural countable noun used for salads.
questions.explanationZh: 制作沙拉需要一些西红柿（tomatoes），注意以 o 结尾的词变复数常加 -es。
questions.coreTakeaway: Tomato plural is tomatoes (add -es). (tomato 的复数是 tomatoes。)

questions.question: The teacher _____ teaches us math is very kind.
questions.explanation: We use 'who' or 'that' as a relative pronoun for people.
questions.explanationZh: 先行词 The teacher 是人，定语从句的引导词要用 who（或者 that）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'who' for people in relative clauses. (定语从句中，先行词是人用 who 引导。)

questions.question: Which word means the same as 'happy'?
questions.explanation: Glad is a synonym for happy.
questions.explanationZh: glad 是 happy 的同义词，意为“高兴的”。
questions.coreTakeaway: Glad and happy are synonyms. (glad 和 happy 是同义词。)

questions.question: I haven't finished my homework ***.
questions.explanation: We use 'yet' at the end of negative sentences and questions in the present perfect.
questions.explanationZh: 在现在完成时的否定句和疑问句末尾，常使用 yet，表示“还（没）”。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'yet' at the end of negative present perfect sentences. (现在完成时否定句末尾用 yet。)

questions.question: What time do you usually _____ up in the morning?
questions.explanation: The phrasal verb 'wake up' or 'get up' means to arise from sleep.
questions.explanationZh: get up / wake up 表示“起床/醒来”，这是描述日常作息的常见短语。
questions.coreTakeaway: Wake up / get up = to stop sleeping and get out of bed. (get/wake up 是起床的固定搭配。)

questions.question: He cut _____ while he was cooking dinner.
questions.explanation: The subject is 'He', so the reflexive pronoun is 'himself'.
questions.explanationZh: 主语是 He（他），表示动作回到主语本身时，反身代词用 himself（他自己）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Match the reflexive pronoun to the subject (He -> himself). (He 对应的反身代词是 himself。)

questions.question: We stayed inside _____ it was raining heavily.
questions.explanation: 'Because' introduces the reason for staying inside.
questions.explanationZh: because 引导原因状语从句，解释待在室内的原因是雨下得很大。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'because' to answer 'why' and give reasons. (because 用于解释原因。)

questions.question: You can borrow books from the ***.
questions.explanation: A library is a place where you borrow books.
questions.explanationZh: library 是图书馆，是一个可以借书的地方。
questions.coreTakeaway: You borrow books from a library. (library 意为图书馆。)

questions.question: *** jacket is this? It is not mine.
questions.explanation: 'Whose' asks about possession or ownership.
questions.explanationZh: 询问物品的主人是谁，应该用疑问代词 whose（谁的）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'whose' to ask who something belongs to. (whose 用来提问“谁的”。)

questions.question: *** you like a cup of tea?
questions.explanation: 'Would you like...' is a polite way to offer something.
questions.explanationZh: Would you like...? 是英语中用来礼貌地提供物品或邀请的常用句型。
questions.coreTakeaway: Polite offer: 'Would you like...?' (Would you like... 用来委婉地提供或邀请。)

questions.question: It's freezing outside! Don't forget your _____.
questions.explanation: A scarf is worn in cold (freezing) weather to keep warm.
questions.explanationZh: freezing 意思是极冷的，在极冷的天气出门需要戴 scarf（围巾）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Wear a scarf in winter to keep your neck warm. (scarf 意为围巾。)

questions.question: I decided _____ study harder this term.
questions.explanation: The verb 'decide' is followed by an infinitive (to + base verb).
questions.explanationZh: 动词 decide 后面要接动词不定式，即 decide to do sth，表示决定做某事。
questions.coreTakeaway: Decide is followed by 'to' + verb. (decide to do sth 决定做某事。)

questions.question: In our _____ class, we learn about different countries, rivers, and mountains.
questions.explanation: Geography is the study of places, landscapes, and environments.
questions.explanationZh: 学习不同国家、河流和山脉的科目是 geography（地理）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Geography is the study of the earth's physical features. (geography 意为地理。)

questions.question: Excuse me, _____ do I get to the train station?
questions.explanation: To ask for directions, we commonly use 'How do I get to...?'
questions.explanationZh: 问路时的常用句型是 How do I get to...，意思是“我该怎么去...”。
questions.coreTakeaway: Ask for directions: How do I get to...? (问路用 How do I get to...? )

questions.question: She is very punctual. She is _____ late for school.
questions.explanation: Punctual means always on time, so she is 'never' late.
questions.explanationZh: punctual 意思是守时的。既然很守时，那就应该是“从不”（never）迟到。
questions.coreTakeaway: Never = 0% of the time. Opposite of always. (never 意为从不。)
